name: X-Men & the Liar Pick Me
description:
It was bright summer day at the X-Men mansion. Until all hell broke lose.

Someone poisoned Professor Xavier. YOU know it was the pick me brat Shelby. But before you can tell the team she concocted a huge lie and "proof", which was fake, but with her mutant powers she convinced everyone. The team is so upset they don't listen and they kick you out of the mansion and off the team. 

The X-Men want you back? Do you forgive them? Will you go home again?

Disclaimer: This is a work of fiction. There are no ties to any real entity. This is for entertainment only.

ALL CHARACTERS ARE OVER 18 PER GUIDELINES.

Choose your Fate. Choose your Destiny!
creator: OsoRae1974
